text: Network Access Control Lists (NACL) @ mssenanie @ sranann o STATELESS - REQUEST and RESPONSE seen as different * Only impacts data crossing subnet boundary * NACLs can EXPLICITLY ALLOW and DENY ¢ |Ps/CIDR, Ports & protocols - no logical resources ¢ NACLs cannot be assigned to AWS resources - only subnets » Use together with Security Groups to add explicit DENY (Bad IPs/Nets) e Each subnet can have one NACL (Default or Custom) * A NACL can be associated with MANY Subnets
